name: Colorado CDPHE Certified General Abatement Contractors

agency.name: Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against CDPHE asbestos support pages and certified-list dashboards before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Colorado-certified General Abatement Contractors and related asbestos certification or registration lists referenced by CDPHE
knownExclusions: This entry is limited to CDPHE asbestos certification and registration material; it is not a general contractor source.
The public dashboard/list shape is not yet adapter-reviewed and may require manual use.
Local building, demolition, and renovation permits are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Use the official CDPHE support page and linked certified-list dashboard manually until access rules and export options are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that an asbestos credential, permit, or record does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: CDPHE links to dashboard-style certified lists, but no stable documented bulk/export interface has been adapter-reviewed.
researchNotes: Colorado CDPHE states that regulated asbestos abatement must be conducted by Colorado-certified General Abatement Contractors and links to certified/registered lists.
maintainerNotes: Keep this source separate from DORA electrical/plumbing; asbestos certification is under CDPHE Air Pollution Control Division.

researchEvidence.note: Official CDPHE asbestos support page states regulated abatement must be conducted by a Colorado-certified General Abatement Contractor and links to certified/registered lists.
Colorado.gov general notices reviewed for privacy/public-records posture; redistribution rights remain unconfirmed.

blocker.summary: The official path is lookup/dashboard oriented and no stable, documented machine-readable interface has been adapter-reviewed.
